entry.title: Re: How to create a CUSTOM EVENT in ABAP S4 HANA
entry.content: You need the Event Enablement Add-on.

entry.title: Re: Worker availabilty data cds view and block time sheet...
entry.content:
Hi Gabriel,

You can check the CDS - I_AvailabilityByWrkAgrmtAndDte to read the daily availability data.

For blocking time recording on non working days, you can implement the BADI-  Timesheet Validations (HCM_CATS_V1_TS_VALIDATION). You can validate the recorded time entries against the non working days from the above CDS view.

Regards,

Seema

entry.title: Re: Harnessing Clean Core and SAP Business AI:Key Partners innovate with extensions during Hack2Buil
entry.content:
Hello Srinath,

thanks for your message. 

We had approvals only from the listed partners to publish. If we get approvals from the other partners, we will do a follow-up blog.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Custom Code Impact Analysis Using ATC
entry.content:
Hi @sudhir_kumar22 ,

We need run ATC report after converstion ECC to S/4HANA or only before conversion?

 

Best Regards,

Daniel Cunha

entry.title: SAC Advance Formula to copy Actuals and Forecast data to another Version
entry.content:
Hello,

I have requirement to copy data of Actuals and Forecast based on selected Source version to Target version in next fiscal year.

For Example

 ActualsForecast
 P1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J06100100100100100100120120120120120120
             
 ActualsForecast
 P1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J07100100100100100100120120120120120120
             
             
ResultP1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J00100100100100100100120120120120120120

For J06, Period 1 to Period 6 are actuals and remaining Periods are Forecast.

For J07 Period 1 to Period 7 are actuals and remaining Periods are Forecast.

Any idea is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Add a new Unit of Measurement for usage rate element
entry.content:
Hi community,

We have a integration scenario SB with Convergent Invoicing  (scope item 51K).

We are trying to rate usage record, but our existing business requirement is that this usage is measured by KWH. The tenant was created after April 2023 and to create the unit of measurement KWH is not possible anymore.

In existing S4HANA implementation, the KWH unit is part of ISO codes, but is this unit is missing in the  https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/setup-administration/standard-units-of-measure#loiofc68b6b17424477eabd6c4d07ee69b2a. 

What can be done in this situation? Is it possible at all to create a custom unit in SB?

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: BOM and Master recipe.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I need your support to fetch the logic for the BOM and their master recipe.

I have one Bom number  and alternative number and I want to check the master recipe (secondary resources ) for the BOM and Alternative combination 

Could you please help me out here ?

Thanks in Advance.

Madhu G

entry.title: Re: DOMAIN using UNIT data type
entry.content: MEINS is based on the data type UNIT. I wouldn't create a domain. Instead, to achieve your requirement, I would create a Help View on the tables T006 and T006A with a filter on your list of unit measures (column MSEHI), and a Search Help on this Help View, then link your selection screen field to this Search Help.

entry.title: Field "Valid From" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to upload using the Migrate Your Data approach and I keep getting this error. Field "Valid From" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9 and Field "Valid To" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9.

My Data looks like this

Thanks

Afshin

entry.title: Alt Tax Classification getting copied from Billing Doc to Order
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have a small query, I have created a new order type which will be created wrf to billing document and new payer will be changed in this order, now the issue is when i create sales order wrf to billing document alt tax classification is getting picked up from billing document header and even when i change the payer alt tax classification isn't getting blank.

Can you please tell me how can i achieve this because new old payer taxes are being copied for new payer also.

I have check copy control and haven't found anything.

I will really appreciate any sort of help.

Thanks

@moazzam_ali

entry.title: Re: DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9: Building number appended to street name
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: 15 lipca z życia Ślązaka
entry.content:
Nic nie zrozumiałem 🥺 

Czy dobrze GenAI przetłumaczył?

"Na dywanie w przedpokoju stoi szafka twoja."

Breaking it down:

  • "Na byfyju" -> "Na dywanie" (on the carpet)
  • "w antryju" -> "w przedpokoju" (in the hallway/entrance hall)
  • "stoi" -> "stoi" (stands)
  • "szolka" -> "szafka" (cabinet)
  • "tyju" -> "twoja" (your)

entry.title: Re: 🇵🇹 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Lisboa, PT)
entry.content: Replying "Yes" to the "Will you be attending?" on this page is enough for now 🙂

entry.title: Re: Manage Cost Rates- Plan
entry.content:
Hi Chanoporn,

The field is only a flag.

When editing data, you need to tick it on to overwrite data.

When editing is done, the flag will still show as No.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to handle References in EHS Rule Editor
entry.content:
Hi @Christophe,

 

thanks for your comment. 

I know that the Rule editor could be used in very much more ways then just writing data to the REAL_SUB level, and it is more then the pure Expert Rule.
In the Help portal for the Rulesets it is described onli in this Line:

  • Field from the reference table

    Syntax: D:<Tabellenfeld in ESTRR> (D:SUBID for example )

    The only field of interest here is RECNREF, the internal record number of the reference. Alternatively, you can enter the field name SUBID and thus fill the fact with the specification key of the reference.

Fact Mapping | SAP Help Portal

I'm able to write something in the Referece area, if all is empty. But my problem is the logic I want to implement if entry are available in the Reference tab.
BR

Kind Regards
Simon

entry.title: Re: Anybody else getting a login-page via Firefox for "SAP Community PROD Baseline"?
entry.content: We will be sure to have the team take a look, there is some work being done to make the login process more efficient and extend sessions.

entry.title: How to set up MySQL remote source through SDI
entry.content:
I'd like to create a MySQL remote source via the CamelJDBCAdapter in SDI. I have a Data Provisioning Agent installed in a host machine.

Do I need to place the .jar files in this host and after that will the CamelJDBCAdapter display in the drop-down list of new remote sources?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set up MySQL remote source through SDI
entry.content:
You can find more information about how to set up the Camel JDBC adapter here: Apache Camel JDBC.

You will have to place the appropriate .jar file (see our Product Area Matrix) in the <DPAgent_root>/camel/lib directory. You will also have to uncomment the configuration of the Camel adapter: Set up the Camel JDBC Adapter.

If you have not used this adapter before, you must register it with SAP HANA before you can use it: Register Adapters with SAP HANA.

After that, the adapter will appear in the drop-down list of adapters you can choose from and you can configure the MySQL remote source: Camel JDBC Remote Source Configuration. Finally, there are some special steps for MySQL which you'll need to be aware of: Connecting to MySQL with the Camel JDBC Adapter.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: One bank account & multiple geographical bank collection centers
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Report-to-Report Interface (RRI) in Data Analyzer SAC
entry.content:
Dear All, 

I would like to ask you for sharing your experience about RRI in SAP Analytics Cloud in Data Analyzer. 

Perhaps, some of you could notice a new update about Report to Report Interface in Data Analyzer which was published 3 weeks ago. 

Here is the link: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q... - SAP Community

Does it work for you in Data Analyzer? 

I customized everything according to the pretty old documentation I found on SAP Community - paragraph abour Report to Report Interface:

Analyse your data live with SAP Analytics Cloud on... - SAP Community

It works for connection between Analysis for Office and Data Analyzer. I can open "Goto" and select Data Analyzer but that's all. 

I cannot jump in Data Analyzer between two reports despite the fact that both queries are added in the BW System in transaction: RSBBS and customized as a sender and receiver. 

Here is the example:

I do not have the option "Jump to". 

Do you have a similar case regarding this "new" functionality?
Perhaps, I did something wrong and you could advise me.

Feel free to comment!

Thanks a lot!
Kind regards,
Artur
SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: Re: How can I prepare for the SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management certification?
entry.content:
Hi @SAUMYASIRI 
It looks like this is a new question.
Would you mind to repost in the Q&A area?

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
If you post it there our subject matter experts will  get back to you and assist.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Replace relative dates by real dates in your SAP Fiori Overview Page
entry.content: very helpful, thank you!

entry.title: Tax depreciation calculation
entry.content:
There is a requirement to calculate tax depreciation on 116% of the asset cost as base.

How do configure the depreciation key to achieve this

Example

Acquisition cost is 100000
dep rate is 25% WDV
1st year dep - 25% of 116000 = 29000
2nd year dep 25% of 116000-29000 i.e. 87000 = 21750
and so on

entry.title: Fixed Asset Impairment and Depreciation in the same period
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts

We need to post impairment start of FY, however the first period of depreciation is still reflecting the previous period depreciation.

Is it possible to update the planned depreciation based on the Impairment Value.

Thanks in Advance

Kind regards and Thanks

entry.title: Re: ADT End of Runnable Exception
entry.content:
It is difficult to tell what the cause might be. In particular, the entry in the Error Log view shown in the screenshot is only of severity "Info", so this might not be / might not point to the root cause.

Since this seems to be very specific to your setup: if you need more assistance beyond the information provided by @ysoethoff above, I'd recommend opening an internal incident in ServiceNow (component BC-DWB-TOO-UT). This will make it easier to analyze the situation in detail.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA technical replacement for FK01 BDC Create Vendor with reference
entry.content:
Hi Markus

Do you need this functionality to mass extend suppliers to new company codes? Or is it just for extending single suppliers?

BR,
Gitte.

entry.title: Re: Track Container Unit in BN4L GTT
entry.content: Check the guide "Implementation Guide for Tracking via Tracking Unit and Reference Document in the TM Scenario"' Option 3 on page 7. You do not have to maintain Shipment AOT type in Transportation Unit type. Check the Note that mentions that events are not forwarded back to TM, some custom development would be required.

entry.title: Re: OpenSAP sunset/end of life - move to SAP Learning what it means.
entry.content:
@JamesRLongstaff  

Following SAP’s learning site consolidation strategy to move to one world-class learning destination, learning.sap.com will be your site for learning and development at SAP moving forward.
With that the openSAP platform will be discontinued in July 2024.

As recently announced, over 100 former openSAP courses have been moved to the SAP Learning site, where they are available in self-paced mode. Explore the courses now and stay tuned for new courses coming soon!

Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite
The first new course on the SAP Learning site offers a concise yet comprehensive introduction to SAP Integration Suite, covering the key capabilities, the importance of a defined enterprise-wide integration strategy, and how you can leverage AI to modernize your business landscape. The course starts August 28 and you can already join and subscribe to the course discussion group on SAP Community.

In the future, new courses will be announced via the SAP Learning Hub newsletter. Don’t miss any announcements and subscribe to the newsletter for free. To learn about new learning opportunities you can also join and subscribe to the SAP Learning Group on SAP Community.

Please fee free to reach out.
Happy day
Eva

entry.title: Personas - Can't change button properties
entry.content:
Hi All

I am trying to change button properties and nothing seems to work. Please check the script tests below.

This is the EWM system and I am working on the RFs transactions. This task is particularly challenging due to the dynamic nature of screen creations, making it difficult to work on them effectively as the object IDs and screen IDs lack uniqueness. Unfortunately and because the BASIS team is unbelievably busy we have no plan to update the system so I need to find a workaround.

So what I am trying to achieve is pretty simple - and it would be simpler if the IDs were unique. I created a button and I want the button to change the text and to hide it if something happens. Nothing works

The color change was just a test and it also does not work. 

Any idea what's going on?

System status:

  • SCREEN PERSONAS 3.0 SP18 -SAP SCREEN PERSONAS 3.0
  • S4HANA ON PREMISE 1909 - SAP S/4HANA 1909

Thanks

Andrea

 

SAP Screen Personas EWM - Radio Frequency

entry.title: Re: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud

Hi 

Also how will the Remote app published via RDS Farm handle? as we use the domain name of the RDS gate way to login how wil that route to MFA of Customer Azure active directory

entry.title: Python Odata Error with Cloud Connector
entry.content:
I've built a simple demo program to consume OData from a Python program in the Cloud Foundry Environment, i've followed some posts about the topic (maybe a little bit old but still valid i guess):
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/part-2-how-to-use-sap-cloud-platform-connectivity-and-cloud-connector-in/ba-p/13341943

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/exposing-on-premise-data-to-sap-cloud-foundry/ba-p/13395536

Attached you'll see the basic code (basic_code.py) i'm using to make the call to the OData service from an On-premise S4Hana system, in the program code appears all the steps to reach from Cloud Foundry the OData service but the final step is failing with this error: "Response from Step 5: Access denied to system <system_id>:443. In case this was a valid request, ensure to expose the system correctly in your cloud connector.Status code: 403"


As far as i see in google the problems seems to be related with the cloud connector, but i'm having problems to see where's exactly the problem, here are some things and info about the destination on BTP and the cloud connector configuration:

-- Destination in BTP: Seems to be fine as works from BAS terminal if i execute the command: "curl <Destination Name>.dest/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_AddressEmailAddress?$format=json"

-- Cloud Connector Config:

My main problem is my lack of knowledge on Cloud Connector, from the program and through the proxy of the connection service i use the virtual host with the corresponding OData path using the proper credentials.

I've checked this note but i don't see any problem in the CC config, so there's no conflict as the subaccount is unique and the location ID used it's also unique.

So the question in this case would be What's the problem?

Also as a side question i would like to use the pyOdata library for this case but i'm not sure how to do it properly once the prior issue is solved.

Any suggestion will be welcome and of course if some other info is required please let me know.

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards.

logging.info("-------------------Step 1: Read the environment variables--------------------")
env = AppEnv()
uaa_service = env.get_service(name='xsuaa-demo-app')
dest_service = env.get_service(name='destination-demo-app')
conn_service = env.get_service(name='connectivity-demo-app')

#logging.info(f"CONNECTIVITY: {conn_service}")
sUaaCredentials = dest_service.credentials["clientid"] + ':' + dest_service.credentials["clientsecret"]
sDestinationName = 'DS4_450_CLONING'
sUaaCredentials_bytes = sUaaCredentials.encode('utf-8')
encoded_credentials = base64.b64encode(sUaaCredentials_bytes).decode('utf-8')
logging.info("------------------Step 2: Request a JWT token to access the destination service----------------------")
headers = {'Authorization': 'Basic '+encoded_credentials, 'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}
form = [('client_id', dest_service.credentials["clientid"] ), ('grant_type', 'client_credentials')]

r = requests.post(uaa_service.credentials["url"] + '/oauth/token', data=form, headers=headers)

logging.info("-------------------Step 3: Search your destination in the destination service---------------------")
token = r.json()["access_token"]
headers= { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token }
r = requests.get(dest_service.credentials["uri"] + '/destination-configuration/v1/destinations/'+sDestinationName, headers=headers)
#logging.info(f"Response from Step 3 --- DESTINATION ---: {r.json()}")
destination = r.json()

logging.info("-------------------Step 4: Request a JWT token to access the connectivity service---------------------")
#create authorization with basic authentication using connectivity credentials as base64 format
conn_sUaaCredentials = conn_service.credentials["clientid"] + ':' + conn_service.credentials["clientsecret"]

conn_sUaaCredentials_bytes = conn_sUaaCredentials.encode('utf-8')
conn_encoded_credentials = base64.b64encode(conn_sUaaCredentials_bytes).decode('utf-8')

headers = {'Authorization': 'Basic '+ conn_encoded_credentials, 'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}
#create formdata with client ID and grant type
formdata = [('client_id', conn_service.credentials["clientid"] ),('client_secret', conn_service.credentials["clientsecret"] ), ('grant_type', 'client_credentials')]

#call the xsuaa service to retrieve JWT
response_conn = requests.post(uaa_service.credentials["url"] + '/oauth/token', data=formdata, headers=headers)

logging.info("-------------------Step 5: Make a call to backend system via SAP CC to read data---------------------")

onpremise_auth = requests.auth.HTTPBasicAuth(destination["destinationConfiguration"]["User"] , destination["destinationConfiguration"]["Password"])

# read the On premise proxy host and on premise proxy port for the connectivity service
proxy_url = conn_service.credentials["onpremise_proxy_host"] + ':' + conn_service.credentials["onpremise_proxy_port"]   
logging.info(f"Proxy URL: {proxy_url}")

#Enter the exact path to your OData service in the SAP System using the virtual host:port details mentioned in the SAP Cloud Connector
url_cc = destination['destinationConfiguration']['URL'] + '/sap/opu/odata/sap/EPM_REF_APPS_SHOP_SRV/Products'
logging.info(f"URL CC: {url_cc}")

#create a dict with proxy relevant information
proxyDict = { 'http' : proxy_url }

# Get JWT token
jwt_conn = response_conn.json()["access_token"]

#create a header with authorization to the proxy server with the JWT retrieved in Step 2
headers = {
'content-type': 'application/json',
'Proxy-Authorization': 'Bearer ' + jwt_conn,
'cache-control': 'no-cache'
}

token = destination["authTokens"][0]

data_response = requests.get( url_cc, proxies=proxyDict, headers=headers, auth = onpremise_auth)
#conver the data 
logging.info(f"Response from Step 5: {str(data_response.text)}")
logging.info(f"Status code: {str(data_response.status_code)}")

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud infrastructure is moving to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

as the amount of features that require this migration increases, it would be very helpful to know more about the migration schedule for tenants towards HANA cloud hosting. This is beginning to be timeline-relevant in increasing number of projects. 

Any updates? 

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Project System Auto Carry Forward Issue
entry.content:
In the Project System (PS) module, I have assigned a budget profile based on annual values. When creating a purchase order in Fiscal Year 2024 against the project, the commitment is correctly made against the 2024 budget. However, when performing a goods receipt (MIGO) for this purchase order in Fiscal Year 2025, the system does not raise a budget exceeded error, even though there is no budget allocated for Fiscal Year 2025.

In Fund Management (FM), MIGO can only be executed if the commitment is carried forward. However, in the Project System, I do not run the commitment carryforward process using transaction CJCF.

Is there an option to enforce a budget check that would prevent the MIGO process in the Project System for the new fiscal year if the commitment has not been carried forward?

entry.title: Re: How can I prepare for the SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management certification?

entry.title: Re: I am interested in the training programs
entry.content:
Vsevolod...Happy to hear you have found residents in Germany. A few thoughts on your post...

  • SAP Learning - Check out free courses (they used to be under OpenSAP)
  • SAP ABAP with SAP AI (machine learning, Generative AI is worth exploring. Here's one post.
  • SAP IT skills are in demand, you just need to find an area where your skills and experiences can make an impact
  • SAP IT Services Management is one of many very good starting points where you could get experience if the right opportunity opens up with SAP, a partner, or customer.

Good luck in your pursuits!
Best regards... Rich

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello!

My name is Hemalatha. I'm excited to share my journey with sap.

entry.title: Re: CPI-Aggregator Use Case-Create separate messages per unique Company Code
entry.content:
Hi Dagmar,

just briefly i will explain the flow , how we can use tha aggregator function in sap cpi.

Corelated: It will mainly helpful for gathering the same correlated messages. the below highlighted message should be same to gather the message at output.

Aggregation Startergy

1)Algorithms: We can mention the output format whether it's sequence manner(ascending,descending,) or combine.

2)Last message: here we need to mention the xpath for the condition ex: /Order_MT/lastProd ='Yes'

3)CompletionTimeout: need to mention the time out frequency in minutes (till this frequency completion iflow will not give the response )

4)DataStore Name: as per your convince we can assign the datastore name

PFA for your reference

Sample Payload: (Message are sent one after the other to the iflow)

1.<Order_MT>
    <orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
    <prodID>1</prodID>
    <supplierName>Santosh</supplierName>
    <productName>Battery</productName>
    <lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
 
2.<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>2</prodID>
<supplierName>test2</supplierName>
<productName>test2</productName>
<lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
3.<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>3</prodID>
<supplierName>test3</supplierName>
<productName>test3</productName>
<lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
4.<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>4</prodID>
<supplierName>test4</supplierName>
<productName>test4</productName>
<lastProd>Yes</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
 
Output:
<multimap:Messages xmlns:multimap="http://sap.com/xi/XI/SplitAndMerge">
<multimap:Message1>
<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>1</prodID>
<supplierName>test1</supplierName>
<productName>test1</productName>
<lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>2</prodID>
<supplierName>test2</supplierName>
<productName>test2</productName>
<lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>3</prodID>
<supplierName>test3</supplierName>
<productName>test3</productName>
<lastProd>No</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
<Order_MT>
<orderNumber>123</orderNumber>
<prodID>4</prodID>
<supplierName>test4</supplierName>
<productName>test4</productName>
<lastProd>Yes</lastProd>
</Order_MT>
</multimap:Message1>
</multimap:Messages>
CPI Message:

 

 

Regards,

Santosh

Please suggest me on this.

entry.title: Smooth Transition Ahead: SAP Enable Now Migration from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
entry.content:
As the digital landscape continues to evolve, SAP Enable Now, currently hosted on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Neo environment, is making strides toward greater efficiency and innovation. With the anticipated internal end of life of the BTP Neo platform scheduled for the end of 2025 (SAP Note 3351844), all SAP Enable Now, cloud edition tenants will need to transition to the new, advanced platform SAP BTP, Kyma runtime.

For SAP Enable Now, this means a re-platforming and a more flexible availability on hyperscalers like Google Cloud Platform (GCP) or Amazon Web Services (AWS) based on availability.

For customers of SAP Enable Now, this means a smoother runtime and a future-proof platform.

Benefit from Advanced Features and Enhanced Resilience

Transitioning to the SAP BTP Kyma platform promises a more resilient and highly available platform for our customers. Besides retaining the existing features, this migration brings an array of new functionalities on the horizon. Customers can look forward to higher scalability, top of the notch database versions, enhanced security, and more detailed monitoring and observability.

The architecture diagram below outlines the future landscape and shows how SAP Enable Now will be running on SAP BTP, Kyma runtime. 

Seamless Migration Strategy

Commercial Impact

Rest easy; this migration comes without any commercial impact. There will be no new material code introduced, making this transition seamless from a commercial perspective.

Technical Considerations

It is planned to migrate the SAP Enable Now tenants from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP Kyma during regular maintenance windows For detailed schedules, please refer to the maintenance windows page.

Single Sign-On (SSO) Adjustments

A critical technical preparation involves updating your single sign-on (SSO) setup. Before migrating to the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime, ensure your identity provider (IdP) sends four additional SAML attributes:

  • given_name
  • family_name
  • email
  • Groups (needed if you've previously sent corporategroups in your SSO configuration)

Without these updates, the SSO functionality may encounter issues post-migration. Detailed preparation steps are available in SAP note 3472200. We recommend that you collaborate with your IdP administrator to implement these updates starting with SAP Enable Now release 2406.

Migration of Single Tenant environments

A few customers are still running SAP Enable Now on single tenant infrastructure. This infrastructure cannot be supported any longer on the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime. Therefore, all current single tenant environments will be commercially and technically migrated to the new material code and the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime. Affected customers have been contacted directly and can follow through with the move at the time of their next renewal.

Migration Timeline and Data Center Management

The migration will be conducted on a data center-by-data center basis. For a comprehensive list of available data centers, please visit SAP's data center information page.

The first data center planned for migration is RI1 in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, with the process commencing in Q4 2024. An announcement regarding this was made to all BTP tenants in Riyadh1 DC in March 2024.

Starting January 2025, all new SAP Enable Now customers will be provisioned on the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime data centers as and when they become available. The migration for existing SAP Enable Now customers will begin in Q2 2025, with preparations having been underway since 2023.

Moving Forward Together

We are committed to ensuring that this migration process is as smooth and beneficial as possible for our customers. The enhanced features and the robustness of the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime will undeniably uplift your experience with SAP Enable Now. Stay tuned for more updates and prepare for a seamless transition.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team. Here's to embracing innovation and looking forward to a prosperous future with SAP Enable Now on the SAP BTP, Kyma runtime!

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
entry.content:
hi @kate_dowle! thanks for answering, hopefully your vacation was good.

so, i noticed that it happens with some specific SMTP servers. I have tried with other public mail providers (e.g., an outlook account set up with an outlook SMTP server) and it worked like a charm. So, I believe that's some mechanism from Gmail that was preventing its usage by APM, but as i don't have access to APM backend, i can't check whether the return from the SMTP server logs an error somewhere in APM. In the gmail account, it also does not display anything wrong.

Please let me know if i can assist them further in the analysis with details that i found .

Best,

Erick

entry.title: Decoding the Future: Exclusive Insights from the FP&A Trends Survey 2024
entry.content:
SAP is thrilled to sponsor the FP&A Trends Survey 2024, garnering insights on financial planning and analysis from over 2,400 responses worldwide. As data's crucial role in decision-making accelerates, it's clear that data quality, technology adoption, and integration are keys to success.

According to the survey, 64% of organisations claim most decisions are now data-driven, increasing from last year's 52%. Yet, 35% of organisations still cite data quality and timeliness as significant obstacles to achieving data-driven decision-making. This underscores the need for continuous investment in improving data quality and integration processes.

The survey further revealed that 40% of organisations upgraded their systems in the past year, reflecting a trend towards modernising FP&A tools for improved data handling and result generation. However, Excel remains as the predominant planning application, underlining the challenge of transitioning towards more advanced platforms.

Underwhelmingly, the adoption of AI and Machine Learning within FP&A has dropped from 11% in 2021 to 6% in 2024, probably due to integration challenges and skills gaps. However, with 15% of organisations planning to adopt AI/ML within six months and 44% in the longer term, we still see the promise of AI/ML realisation in the future.

These insights are merely the tip of the iceberg from the comprehensive FP&A Trends Survey 2024. For a more detailed analysis and a deep dive into data-driven decision-making, forecasting, scenario planning, technology adoption and much more, kindly access the full survey here. 

The survey provides a wealth of information that is highly beneficial for any finance professional looking for current trends and best practices in FP&A. Don't miss out on this opportunity to learn and stay at the forefront of FP&A practices.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA における「開発者拡張」とその使いどころ
entry.content:
開発者拡張からPublic Interfaceを経由してアクセスできるオブジェクトと、Remote APIを経由してアクセスできるオブジェクトには差異はないという理解でよいでしょうか（どちらもリリース済オブジェクトのみアクセス可）

もしそうであれば、開発者拡張とSide-by-Side拡張(ABAP利用時)は制約面では同じで、制約面がクリアできるなら選択が可能と考えております。

entry.title: Re: Brazil Localization - Send of Nfse PDF to the customer
entry.content: Sorry??

entry.title: Re: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SachinBG

The IDP integration in Cloud Control Center helps determine the way the user signs-in to B1 components such as Desktop or Webclient. To reach the Desktop client, users will still need to establish a connection with a remote server, usually over RDPweb.
These 2 layers can be completely separated. You can provide user the needed credentials to establish the RDPweb connection to your presentation server and setup customer's Azure IDP under the Customer's entity (in IDP tab) to allow customer to sign-in to B1 components with his Azure account. 
For web client or web interface, the customer can use directly his Azure IDP account, as there's no RDP involved in the middle.

Hope I answered your question.

Best Regards
Guy

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition screen controls

in OLME>Environment Data>Define Attributes of System Messages

set ME039 Delivery date is in the past as "E" (error).

entry.title: Re: CPI-Aggregator Use Case-Create separate messages per unique Company Code

thank you SantoshKabbur - if you dont mention the "last message", instead you will write: "false()" and you will just define CompletionTimeout - e.g. 1 minute,  does that mean, that the message is sent after all items have been processed + 1 minute?

or does not matter that the messages have not been processed all, it will send to the next step after 1 minute?

 

Thank you,

BR
Dagmar

entry.title: Re: Shared Memory-enabled Classes and Create Data – Area Handle
entry.content: After the Value is retrived..How to clear the attribute value. As once detach is done only references are cleared but not the attribute value if ran again it still fetches old value from memory area.

entry.title: Integration Center chose start entity for Learning jobs - best practice?
entry.content:
hi!

I am wondering if there is a best practice from SAP in regards to the starting entity for the user import via integration center for learning. All i could find is a blog - that covers the topic very vaguely.

I am asking this because the navigation from the user entity is most of the time messy when you have EC and you cannot always read the data from the fields that are effectively dated - and the solution offered by the integration is to change the starting entity (so from the EP to EC entities).

Moreover when we discuss starting from the user entity who does not support ID & Definitions as separate fields in EP - when in LMS you do have the possibility for most of the job related fields to import data with ID and Description separately in the connector.

Is this something that is worth a discussion for you as well?
What are your pros and cons when we talk integrating the user data with Learning from empJob (EC) OR from user (EP)?

thank you!
Adina

entry.title: Re: Do we have configuration check option in s4 HANA EWM ?
entry.content: run program /SCWM/R_EEC_CHECK

entry.title: Re: Posted the stock using MIGO, move type 561, showing i...
entry.content:
Hi all, the issue is resolved after moving the AATP related scope of check to Quality system. Now it is showing the ATP in CO09

the new AATP is active in Quality system but its corresponding scope of check was not moved to Quality.

Previously in below scope of check, the stocks, receipts, requirements all are blank.

Thanks!

entry.title: Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hello and Welcome! I am pleased to present the latest innovations in Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release.

Here are the two innovations as part of this release in Two-Tier ERP:
    1. Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP                                                                        2. Warranty Claim Process in Two-Tier ERP

Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP 

Our First highlight is Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning in Two-Tier ERP. 

 A Two-Tier ERP business scenario involves Tier-2 subsidiary company using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Tier-1 headquarters using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. The headquarters needs to do group level planning for all subsidiary companies, including future carbon emissions planning and financial planning at transaction level.  This provides plan vs. actual comparison for variance analysis and regular course correction for strategic decision making.

 SAP has a solution for this scenario. Incorporating greenhouse gas emissions planning using Integrated Financial Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud for SAP S/4HANA presents opportunities for companies to evaluate the financial plan with carbon emission factors and calculate the future carbon footprints of the organization.

 The financial plan data serves as the foundation for calculating carbon dioxide equivalents (CO2e). The same plan structures, such as the quantity structures and allocation rules used for cost allocation, can also be reused to allocate CO2e to respective cost objects. The integrated financial planning model enables measuring the estimated impact of greenhouse gas emissions. Thus, pro-actively helping Two-Tier ERP customers make critical decisions related to the value chain across the group.

For more information refer to the blog post: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP

Warranty Claim Process for Two-Tier ERP

The second highlight is Warranty claim scenario in Two-Tier ERP. We have Tier-2, a subsidiary company running on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition primarily serves as a after sales service agency for an equipment sold to the customer from the headquarters as Tier-1 running on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. Here headquarters play a role of vendor for the service organization at the subsidiary.

 As part of after-sales service for an equipment under warranty, a customer warranty claim is registered. The system automatically validates claims based on the claim type and the applicable validity period. A corresponding vendor claim is created. customer claim and vendor claim are validated.

Vendor claim details are shared with the headquarters through replication of customer claim at headquarter for reimbursement to the service organization at subsidiary acting as the internal customer for the headquarters. Approved claim amounts are manually communicated to the subsidiary and is maintained through supplier responses in the Supplier Claim. Finally, the post-to-finance action for claims at both the tiers clears out account postings related to supplier and vendor claims.

For more information refer to the blog post: Warranty Claim process in Headquarter - Subsidiary Model for Two-Tier ERP

 Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X. 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series! 

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 45-minute-long recording and a presentation for Two-Tier ERP/Early Release Series: Two-Tier ERP as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Extend Fiori App based on RAP (F4832) to add custom f...

For this exemple adding filters and columns works fine, but no data in value help list since CDS entiy ZI_ProductHierarchyVH is not part of ODATA of the original apps.

entry.title: Can we permission the Self Description feature in Spotlight?
entry.content:
Good day, 

Can we consider making the Self Description feature in Spotlight manageable through RBP? SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

Such an open text box for employees creates room for anything to be entered that can be in violation and controversial. 

Making the feature manageable through permissions will help companies deter any situations of controversy. 

Regards,

Sean

entry.title: Re: How to enable an OData V4 service for anonymous access?
entry.content:
@Andre_Fischer  : this is very nice blog.

I have implemented the same solution and did work as expected.

Question: When we try to execute GET method, it is not generating the X_CSRF token.

i have used 'Use as request' and selected 'x-csrf-token = <CSRF token>' & 'x-csrf-token= fetch' from 'Add header from value help' still no luck.

hence this is causing in POST method, CSRF token is required. 

Kindly help.

Thank You,

Srini.

entry.title: SAC Interview Questions (Basic)
entry.content:
Here's a quick questions and answers guide for preparing SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). This guide covers essential aspects of SAC, including its features, capabilities, and best practices. SAP Analytics Cloud is a comprehensive cloud platform designed to combine business intelligence, planning, and predictive analytics in a single solution. It empowers organizations to make data-driven decisions through advanced data visualization, interactive dashboards, and robust analytical tools. Whether you're a seasoned professional or new to SAC, this guide will help you understand the fundamentals and prepare for effective use of the platform.

Questions:

1). What is SAC?

A cloud-based analytics tool by SAP for data analysis, visualization, and decision-making.

SAP analytics cloud is end-to-end cloud solution offered by SAP that integrates Business Intelligence , Planning, Augmented analytics, predictive analytics in a unified platform to make effective decision on organization's data. Basically, a SaaS that combines all analytical capability in a single product for all its users

2). What is the purpose of SAC?

It enables users to access and analyze data from various sources, create interactive dashboards and reports, conduct predictive analytics, and collaborate on insights

 

3). What is Model in SAC?

 "Model" refers to the structured representation of data that is imported or connected to SAC for analysis, visualization, and reporting purposes.

It includes the data schema, dimensions, measures, and relationships necessary for analyzing and visualizing the data effectively within SAC.

 

4). Types of Model?

Live Data Connection :

model establishes a direct connection to an external data source, such as SAP HANA, SAP BW, or other databases. It allows SAC to query and analyze data in real-time without importing it into SAC.

Imported Data Model :

 type of model, data is imported from external sources into SAC and stored within the SAC environment. This allows for offline analysis and provides more flexibility in data manipulation and modeling within SAC.

5). Briefly describe stories in SAP Analytics Cloud

Combine visualizations, charts, and text to communicate insights derived from data analysis.

 

6).In SAP Analytics Cloud, what is the role of predictive analytics?

Predictive analytics allows for predicting future trends by analyzing present and past data. We can uncover valuable insights from the given data by applying robust predictive models. We can also discover relationships between different data with the support of predictive models.

 

7). Name the vital components of an SAP Analytics Cloud.

Digital Boardroom

Analytic applications

Stories

MS Office integration

Enterprise Planning

Business Intelligence

Platform Services

Augmented Analytics

 

8).What do you understand by digital boardroom in SAP Analytics Cloud?

A single presentation in the SAP analytics cloud combines multiple stories. hey give an overview of a business with summaries of different sections in one place.

 

9).List the various data modeling applied in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Relational Data Modeling

E-R Data Modeling

Dimensional Data Modeling

 

10). How is smart prediction performed in SAP Analytics Cloud?

 Smart prediction is made with the help of SAP Machine Learning algorithms. The ML algorithms dig out the relationships between different data and build a formula known as a predictive scenario. We use this formula to predict future trends.'

Three predictive scenarios: regression, classification, and times series

 

11). How is SAP Analytics Cloud advantageous to Tableau?

SAP Analytics Cloud offers better connectivity than Tableau.

Pricing is better for SAP Analytics Cloud than Tableau

Upgrades are challenging in Tableau

SAP Analytics Cloud provides robust BI models to generate effective reports.

12). What is Smart Predict

Smart Predict uses SAP machine learning algorithms to explore relationships in your dataset and build a formula – a Predictive Scenario – to predict future events or trends

13). What is  Smart Insights

With Smart Insights features, business users uncover critical hidden insights from data previously unseen.

 

 14). What is Smart Discovery

Smart Discovery gives an overview of your data by automatically building charts to begin discovering more about your data.

 

15). What is Search to insights

“Search to Insight” is one such feature that brings conversational AI to SAP Analytics Cloud wherein you can create a story by asking questions in natural language.

16). What are dimensions in SAC?

dimensions are attributes that provide context and structure to your data. They typically represent qualitative data, such as product names, customer

17). What are Measures in SAC?

Measures are numerical values representing quantitative data that can be analyzed, aggregated, and compared.

18.) What are the different types of Charts?

 

In SAP Analytics Cloud, there are various types of charts available for visualizing data. Some common types include:

 

**Column Chart**: Represents data using vertical bars, suitable for comparing values across categories.

 

**Bar Chart**: Similar to column charts but with horizontal bars, useful for comparing values within categories.

 

**Line Chart**: Displays data as points connected by lines, suitable for showing trends over time or continuous data.

 

**Area Chart**: Similar to line charts but with the area below the lines filled, emphasizing the magnitude of values over time.

 

**Pie Chart**: Shows data as slices of a circular pie, useful for displaying proportions or percentages of a whole.

 

**Donut Chart**: Similar to pie charts but with a hole in the center, allowing for multiple series comparison.

 

**Combo Chart**: Combines different chart types (e.g., columns and lines) in a single chart, useful for comparing different data types simultaneously.

 

**Scatter Plot**: Represents individual data points on a two-dimensional plane, useful for identifying relationships or correlations between variables.

 

**Bubble Chart**: Similar to scatter plots but with bubbles of varying sizes representing additional data dimensions.

 

**Treemap**: Displays hierarchical data as nested rectangles, with the size of each rectangle representing a measure.

 

**Heat Map**: Represents data using colors in a matrix format, useful for highlighting patterns or trends in large datasets.

19). What are the types of filters in SAC?

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), there are several types of filters that users can apply to analyze data:

Story, page, widgets

**Dimension Filters**: Allow users to filter data based on specific values or ranges within dimensions, such as product categories, regions, or time periods.

 

**Measure Filters**: Enable users to filter data based on specific numerical values or ranges within measures, such as sales revenue, quantities sold, or profit margins.

 

**Time Filters**: Specifically designed for filtering data based on time-related dimensions, such as dates, months, quarters, or years. Users can apply time filters to analyze data within specific time periods.

 

**Input Controls**: Provide interactive filtering options, such as dropdown lists, checkboxes, or sliders, allowing users to select specific values or ranges dynamically.

 

**Page Filters**: Allow users to create multiple pages within a story or report, each with its set of filters applied to analyze data from different perspectives.

 

**Rank Filters**: Enable users to filter data based on ranked values, such as top or bottom performers within a dataset.

 

**Advanced Filters**: Provide more complex filtering options, allowing users to create custom filter conditions using expressions or formulas.

These filters help users customize their data analysis and focus on relevant information based on their specific requirements.

20). What are the different types of pages in SAC?

Responsive, Canvas, Grid, and From Smart Discovery pages

 

21). What is Linked Analysis:

Linked Analysis in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) refers to the capability to create relationships between different visualizations or elements within a story or report. It allows users to interactively explore data across multiple charts, tables, or other visualizations by establishing connections between them.

22). What is Threshold?

A threshold is a predefined limit used to highlight certain conditions they provide visual cues to users for better interpretation and analysis of data in SAC visualizations.

23).What is Geo Map and its types?

 "Geo Map" is a visualization tool that displays geographical data on a map.

Bubble

Choropleth

Heatmap

Flow map

24). Difference between Model and Dataset

25).What are public dimensions?

Public dimensions are stand-alone entities that are created independently and can be shared among multiple models.

26). Two types of model:

Analytic and Planning

26).  What is Planning?

SAC Planning is solution offered by SAP to streamline the planning process, budget and forecasting. It integrates both financial and operational planning along with business intelligence to provide a unified platform for effective business decision making.

 

27). How do we start with planning activities in SAC?

Firstly, we create any public dimension if we require in our planning purposes. Define the hierarchy and load the data into them. Then, we create model and add these public dimensions, along with Account dimension and load the data to it. Once this is set we can build a story and use this model to create our planning story.

 

28). What is unbooked data?

Unbooked data is a feature in SAC which shows the cells that contain blank values which can be used for planning. there is no corresponding transactional data for a field.

 

29).What is Data Lock in SAC?

prevents changes to specific data at different stage of the planning process

The option to lock the cell so that others when collaborated do not edit that particular cell. Right-click data lock.

 

30). How to maintain currency table in SAC.

In the modeling section, we have currency conversion tab, where we can import the data.

 

31).What is public dimension?

Stand-alone entities that are created independently and can be shared among multiple models.

Public dimension is entity that can be created by the user which is independent of a model. This can be used in any model

 

 

32). What is Allocation?

Allocation is process of splitting the derived source values into multiple values and storing values in the target data. Allocation is used in planning and data analysis to gain insights.

Spreading : values of source cell are spread across the leaf members . Values taken from higher level of hierarchy to lower level

Distributing : Distribution is another type of allocation that changes values within a hierarchy by distributing amounts from a source member to leaf members of its siblings

Assigning: you can append or overwrite target cells without specifying a source cell

 

 

33). What is variance

Original Budget

Revised Budget

Actual

Planning variance = Original Budget - Revised Budget

Operational Variance = Revised - Actual

 

 

 

34).  What is Data Action

Data actions are a flexible planning tool for making structured changes to

model data, including copying data from one model to another

 

 

35). What is Value driver tree

A value diver tree is a what-if simulation that enables end users to simulate

the outcome of their decisions

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Checking Retry Count at Runtime in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: I reached out to the author of this very blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cloud-integration-what-you-need-to-know-about-the-kafka-adapter/ba-p/13495070 and he let me know that there are no plans to implement a counter right now, it's not straightforward and may have performance impact, so he would recommend to model the retry on your own within the integration flow model using an exception process, see comment in his blog post: The option to retry a failed message can potentially lead to infinite retries. Therefore, it is recommended to handle failed messages in an exception subprocess

entry.title: Replication from ECC system to S/4 system using SLT
entry.content: We have a requirement to replicate from ECC to S/4 using SLT. The tables will already exist in the target system. Is this scenario supported in SLT? and apart from data integrity concerns, are there any risks associated with this approach?

entry.title: fiori elements list report and object page value help with odata v2
entry.content:
Hello,

i am new to fiori elements and struggling with value help. I have odata v2 and 750 in the backend.

i am not sure about the possibilities with odata v2, also i read many postings about this topic.

i need a value help, which works with a in-parameter from my main entity. i tried to code it in my mpc_ext, but in dpc_ext i get no filter at all for the value-help-entity. 

how to do this - maybe it is not possible this way with odata v2 ? 

the next value help problem is another, where i need a in-parameter and a fix value - i could make multiple entitysets, but maybe there is a better solution.

Thanks for your help

Helmut

entry.title: Need to send notifications for Resource Consumption going above threshold
entry.content: Business users want to track Resource consumption and have raised a request to enable notifications if Resource consumption goes beyond 70%. Only KBA we could find was this. Is there any other way to enable Notifications (not use data with external system) and send E-mails for Resource consumption?

entry.title: Log on balancing error
entry.content:
While opening ECP 

Getting error "Logon balancing: Parser  error in H/DNSIP/M...

I checked the ping and ping is good.

Please Answer the reasons for this error and possible solution.

entry.title: Re: Request failed with status code 403 in sap in Business application studio.
entry.content: Hi Mayur, Did you find any Solution on this ? I am facing the same error

entry.title: Communication Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via APIs
entry.content:
Introduction

With the release of the 2408 version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, customers will now be able to create Communication Systems, Communication Users and Communication Arrangements via APIs. You can also read the existing Communication Scenarios via an API.

These are enabled via the Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0A48.

You can create a Communication Arrangement for the communication scenario SAP_COM_0A48 and then use the exposed APIs to perform communication management via those APIs.

Implementation

As an example, you can refer the screenshots attached below to understand how to use these APIs. I have used the API Communication Arrangements to create a communication arrangement.

  • The API is used to create a communication arrangement REMOTE_SCEN_109 for the communication scenario SAP_COM_0109 in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system via Postman, using a POST request

  • The following JSON is passes as the body for the API request

 

{
    "CommunicationScenarioID": "SAP_COM_0109",
    "CommunicationSystemID": "YPD100",
    "Name": "REMOTE_SCEN_109",
    "Description": ""
}​

 

  • The communication arrangement REMOTE_SCEN_109 is created in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system upon executing the POST request from Postman

Conclusion

You can use the APIs Communication Systems, Communication Users to create communication users and communication systems similarly.

This means that these APIs can now be used to automate communication management from BTP and outside of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, based on custom automation requirements

Do follow the community page for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for more updates.

entry.title: fixed asset partial sell
entry.content:
hi,

in SAP B1 we a have a fixed asset that is the whole rack in the warehouse in one location, we need to sell part of the asset to another location.

is there any type of process where we can create another fixed asset based on a partial of the main asset?

for example we have a complete PC, but we want to sell the keyboard or a mouse 

thanks for the help

entry.title: Re: CPI-Aggregator Use Case-Create separate messages per unique Company Code
entry.content:
Hi Dagmar,

I simulate the same scenario by using Last message as "false()" after 1+mins also request is collecting in Data store and Whenever the iflow hits will  be closed then it iflow will wait for 1 more mins and providing the response. Thanks for your suggestions so i can implement the same scenarios in payments.

 

Thanks,

Santosh

entry.title: copied absence issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts and happy Monday!

I have an issue with a recently new created absence created by copy of an existing one.

So I have created the new absence type by copy as i said, i linked it to a particular rule and all the standard procedures.

 

I have created a new absence in IT2001 for a particular associate and used the one i created, no problems.

But when i run the time evaluation and afterwards i run the salary and get the payslip, i have a line with my new absence (so far so good) but also a line with the original I used for the copy even tough no records of the "old" one are maintained in IT2001.

 

Probably this has a very basic solution, sorry I am new to the topic 🙂

 

Thank you and have a lovely week!

entry.title: Re: Maintaining Multiple GR/IR GL Account
entry.content:
Hello,

You should click Add button.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Update the user who's approving a Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
hello

if you are using standard workflow then first you have to update the approver (the agent) in OLME>Purchase Requisition>Release Procedure>Procedure with Classification>Set Up Procedure with Classification>Workflow

once this is done you can redetermine the agent in an existing workflow

you can do that by displaying the work item, click Edit>Change and then Execute Agent Rules or alternatively you can use the program RSWIWILS (t-code SWI1_RULE).

entry.title: EWM and Personas : Menu ID and Slipstream versus EWM_Mobgui
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a question.

We are currently upgrading from S/4 2019 Personas SP16 to S/4 2023 on prem with Personas SP18.

I have 2 questions:

  1. I've tested the new feature to color a specific button on EWM RF menu described in chapter 5.1.1 in the PDF .

It's working fine but I tried to search in scripting if I could find the MENU ID to trigger a script based on menu item. I couldn't find it. I'm currently using the text of the button:

2. Slipstream versus EWM_Mobgui

All my end-users are on S/4 2019 working with Slipstream without any problem.

We are upgrading to S/4 2023, do I have to move to EWM_mobgui or stay on SE engine?

I couldn't find any feature comparison between the 2 version. And when I testing ewm_mobgui, I don't see any benefit compare to SE. (I do understand that's an improvement compared to old ITS mobile).

 

Thanks and best regards,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: How can I change the description of a data definition using ADT
entry.content:
Dear all,
I have created a couple of new data definitions by using the copy & paste functionality in ADT. Now, all the new data definitions inherited the description of the very first definition. I have tried to figure out how to change that description. I was not successful. Even in the properties section, I am not able to change it.
Does anyone have a hint for me?
Thanks
